title: elaeocarpus magnifolius
intro: Elaeocarpus magnifolius, also known as the "Tetrasepalous Elaeocarpus" or "Mountain Apple", is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus magnifolius include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from pain and swelling. In herbal preparations, the leaves and fruits of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
